# CTOS Portfolio Roadmap
# 05 — Motion Layer (RMD v1.0)

## Objective

Transform the portfolio from a professional website into a memorable interactive experience.

Motion must:

- Reinforce architecture thinking
- Communicate system relationships
- Guide attention
- Improve comprehension
- Strengthen branding

Motion must NOT:

- Distract users
- Reduce performance
- Harm accessibility

---

# Motion Philosophy

Motion Has Purpose.

Every animation must answer one question:

Why does this animation exist?

Valid reasons:

- Explain
- Guide
- Reveal
- Connect
- Confirm
- Delight

---

# Current Assessment

Current Motion Score:

6.5/10

Current State:

- Hover transitions
- Tooltips
- Basic card interactions
- Reduced motion support

Missing:

- Storytelling motion
- Architecture visualization
- SVG morphing
- System relationships
- Signature interactions

---

# Motion Success Criteria

Motion Layer complete when:

- Motion system centralized
- Hero becomes interactive
- SVG morphing implemented
- Scroll storytelling implemented
- Signature interactions implemented
- Lighthouse remains >= 90

---

# Motion Tokens

Fast
120ms

Normal
220ms

Slow
400ms

Reveal
600ms

Story
800ms

---

# Easing Standards

Default

cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1)

---

# Sprint M1 — Motion Foundation

## Goal

Create reusable animation infrastructure.

### Modules

lib/animations/

hero.ts
cards.ts
cursor.ts
navigation.ts
reveal.ts
svg.ts
search.ts

---

## Rules

No animation logic inside pages.

Reusable only.

Composable only.

---

# Sprint M2 — Reveal System

## Goal

Standardize content appearance.

### Reveal Types

Fade Up

Fade In

Scale Reveal

Mask Reveal

Line Reveal

Word Reveal

---

### Usage Rules

Hero

Section Headers

Metrics

Case Study Sections

---

## Forbidden

Long paragraphs

Entire articles

---

# Sprint M3 — Navigation Motion

## Goal

Create premium navigation feel.

### Desktop

Hide on scroll down

Reveal on scroll up

Glass blur transition

---

### Mobile

Bottom navigation reveal

Safe-area aware animation

---

# Sprint M4 — Hero Motion System

## Goal

Create signature first impression.

### Components

Hero Nodes

Hero Connections

Hero Signals

Hero Tooltips

---

### Node Interactions

Hover

- scale
- glow
- metadata reveal

Click

- expand panel

---

### Connection Motion

Animated signal pulses

Data flow visualization

---

# Sprint M5 — SVG Motion System

## Goal

Build custom SVG ecosystem.

### Animation Types

Stroke Draw

Path Reveal

Node Pulse

Gradient Shift

Connection Pulse

---

### Future Morph Chains

Infrastructure
→ Cloud
→ Automation
→ AI
→ Architecture

Certificate
→ Knowledge
→ Capability

Project
→ Case Study
→ Documentation

---

# Sprint M6 — Cursor System

## Goal

Create contextual interaction layer.

### Cursor States

Default

Explore

Open

View Project

View Case Study

Download Resume

---

### Rules

Desktop only.

Disable on touch devices.

---

# Sprint M7 — Card Interaction System

## Goal

Increase perceived depth.

### Effects

Tilt

Depth Shift

Glow

Metadata Reveal

---

### Targets

Project Cards

Certificate Cards

Case Study Cards

---

# Sprint M8 — Scroll Storytelling

## Goal

Turn scrolling into narrative.

### Targets

Case Studies

Architecture Sections

Flagship Projects

---

### Storytelling Effects

Sequential Reveal

Diagram Build-Up

Metrics Activation

Connection Highlighting

---

# Sprint M9 — Command Palette Motion

## Goal

Premium keyboard-first interaction.

### Animations

Palette Expand

Result Transition

Focus Highlight

Selection Transition

---

### Constraints

Under 100ms perceived latency.

---

# Sprint M10 — Certificate Vault Motion

## Goal

Elevate certificate experience.

### Interactions

Folder Open

Card Expand

Metadata Reveal

Credential Preview

---

# Sprint M11 — Visitor Globe Motion

## Goal

Signature analytics interaction.

### Interactions

Rotate

Country Hover

Tooltip Reveal

Country Focus

---

### Constraints

Lazy loaded.

Never above fold.

---

# Sprint M12 — Micro Interaction Inventory

Required Minimum:

50+

Core Inventory:

01 Magnetic Button
02 Dynamic Arrow
03 Hover Glow
04 Card Tilt
05 Card Depth
06 SVG Morph
07 Scroll Reveal
08 Line Reveal
09 Word Reveal
10 Number Counter
11 Cursor Label
12 Cursor Scale
13 Navigation Hide
14 Navigation Reveal
15 Theme Morph
16 Language Switch
17 Project Filter
18 Search Expand
19 Search Suggestion
20 Command Palette Open
21 Command Palette Search
22 Certificate Hover
23 Certificate Open
24 Case Study Reveal
25 Architecture Diagram Animate
26 Skill Card Hover
27 Expertise Matrix Hover
28 Timeline Progress
29 Scroll Indicator
30 Globe Rotation
31 Globe Hover
32 Visitor Counter
33 Footer Reveal
34 Contact Validation
35 Contact Success
36 Loading Skeleton
37 Page Transition
38 Route Transition
39 Section Indicator
40 CTA Pulse
41 CTA Magnetic
42 Signal Pulse
43 Node Hover
44 Node Expand
45 Project Preview
46 Metadata Reveal
47 Dark Mode Morph
48 Light Mode Morph
49 Floating Action Expand
50 Architecture Map Interaction

---

# Accessibility Rules

Support:

prefers-reduced-motion

---

Disable:

Parallax

SVG Morphing

Depth Motion

Heavy Scroll Effects

---

Keep:

Opacity

Fade

Simple Reveal

---

# Performance Budget

Target FPS

60fps

---

Animation Frame Budget

16ms

---

Lighthouse

90+

---

INP

<200ms

---

# AI Agent Rules

Rule M-01

Motion must support meaning.

Rule M-02

Never animate everything.

Rule M-03

Prioritize readability.

Rule M-04

SVG before Canvas.

Rule M-05

Canvas before ThreeJS.

Rule M-06

Accessibility is mandatory.

Rule M-07

Performance takes priority over visual effects.

---

# Definition of Done

- Motion engine centralized.
- Hero motion complete.
- SVG motion complete.
- Cursor system complete.
- Scroll storytelling complete.
- Certificate vault motion complete.
- Visitor globe motion complete.
- 50+ micro interactions implemented.
- Reduced motion fully supported.
- Lighthouse >= 90.

---

# Next Layer

06-authority-layer.rmd
